name: qrx
description: hyperprompting REPL that fits in a qrcode

scripts.build:github: GITHUB_PAGES=true node servers/github/build.js && GITHUB_PAGES=true vite build
scripts.build:reddit: REDDIT_BUILD=true vite build && node servers/reddit/build.js && vite build --config servers/reddit/vite.server.config.js
